description: Style Note baggit was founded in 1990 and since then has created a name in the market for fighting against cruelty to animals. A practical and stylish choice of bag in orange with extra roomy space and comfortable to carry, this fabric bag will give a sophisticated look to any casual outfit. Product Details Orange bag with two main zipped compartments and an inner zipped pocket One long metallic chain for carrying ease Pleated design and branding on the base Material and Care Blended fabric Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt Do not store in direct sunlight Size Height: 15 cm Width: 22 cm Depth: 9 cm
